name: a repeated stack-add of the same namespace collapses to a single entry (idempotent)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --stack-add react --stack-add react --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["stack"].count{|e|e["namespace"]=="react"}==1 ? 0:1)' && echo stack-idempotent 1>&2
